description: PKB Starter -- Skill installation profiles. Each profile selects a subset of skills from skill_catalog.json.

core.name: Core
core.description: No external skills. Pure PKB Starter with basic web collector and wiki tools.

student.name: Student
student.description: Academic research skills for paper analysis, literature review, and note-taking.

research.name: Research
research.description: Full research pipeline: literature search, deep research, agent-based analysis, semantic search.

developer.name: Developer
developer.description: Document processing, semantic code search, and project kanban management.

creator.name: Creator
creator.description: Content creation with wiki management and project tracking.

full.name: Full Stack
full.description: All recommended skills. Academic + document + search + project management.

custom.name: Custom
custom.description: Interactive selection from the full catalog. Choose exactly which skills to install.

risk_policy.medium: Install but warn about external dependencies and token usage.
risk_policy.high: Require explicit --enable-risky flag. Display MCP/runtime requirements before install.
risk_policy.reference_only: Never install. Display as read-only reference in catalog.
